stemHtml: What can the elevator do if the entire stabiliser is trimmed for a nose-down configuration due to an out-of-trim condition?

options.a: The elevator can compensate for the nose-down trim by automatically increasing its lift.
options.b: The elevator can compensate for the nose-down trim by automatically trimming in the opposite direction.
options.c: The elevator can compensate for the nose-down trim by deploying speed brakes.
options.d: The elevator is mechanically attached to the stabiliser and cannot compensate for the nose-down trim.
